feed.title: Yuedu Reader Engineering
feed.subtitle: Engineering notes from Yuedu Reader, a native iOS reader built with SwiftUI and CoreText.

entry.title: Adapting EPUB 3 Features to CoreText in Yuedu Reader
entry.summary: How Yuedu Reader routes fixed layout, media overlays, HTML5 media, CSS float, tables, and RTL/bidi EPUB behavior through a native CoreText reading engine.

entry.title: From WebView to CoreText: Building a Native EPUB Reader for iOS
entry.summary: How CJK vertical writing pushed Yuedu Reader away from WebView and toward a custom CoreText rendering engine.
